(Untyped ((((MPfile ("EtaCon")) "addone") (ConstantDecl (constant_body (Some (tLambda nAnon (tApp (tConstruct (inductive ((MPfile ("Agda" "Builtin" "Nat")) "Nat") 0) 1 ()) (tRel 0))))))) (((MPfile ("EtaCon")) "example") (ConstantDecl (constant_body (Some (tApp (tApp (tApp (tConst ((MPfile ("EtaCon")) "cons")) tBox) (tApp (tConstruct (inductive ((MPfile ("Agda" "Builtin" "Nat")) "Nat") 0) 1 ()) (tConstruct (inductive ((MPfile ("Agda" "Builtin" "Nat")) "Nat") 0) 0 ()))) (tConstruct (inductive ((MPfile ("Agda" "Builtin" "List")) "List") 0) 0 ())))))) (((MPfile ("EtaCon")) "cons") (ConstantDecl (constant_body (Some (tLambda nAnon (tLambda nAnon (tLambda nAnon (tApp (tApp (tConstruct (inductive ((MPfile ("Agda" "Builtin" "List")) "List") 0) 1 ()) (tRel 1)) (tRel 0))))))))) (((MPfile ("Agda" "Builtin" "List")) "List") (InductiveDecl (mutual_inductive_body Finite 0 ((one_inductive_body "List" false IntoAny ((constructor_body "Ֆ5bՖՖ5dՖ" 0) (constructor_body "Ֆ_Ֆcons_" 2)) ()))))) (((MPfile ("Agda" "Builtin" "Nat")) "Nat") (InductiveDecl (mutual_inductive_body Finite 0 ((one_inductive_body "Nat" false IntoAny ((constructor_body "zero" 0) (constructor_body "suc" 1)) ()))))) (((MPfile ("LamBox")) "Empty") (InductiveDecl (mutual_inductive_body Finite 0 ((one_inductive_body "Empty" false IntoAny () ())))))) (Some (tConst ((MPfile ("EtaCon")) "example"))))
